name: P31 Social Cards
description: Ten share-ready 1080×1080 cards in P31 canonical palette: stat flex, fleet status, the quote, perception/reality diptych, ethics-as-architecture, emotional closer, dev flex, K₄ SVG geometry, trim-tab literary, ASCII tetrahedron. Open the page, screenshot a card, share it. The master's tools, disassembling the master's house.
